meta.title: Using NTIA’s VEX To Tame The Vulnerability Tsunami
meta.description:
Eric Byres of aDolus dives into the reason for Vulnerability Exploitability Exchange (VEX) and how he thinks it will help deal with the huge amount of vulnerabilities that asset owners will become aware of. Aware of because they have been there for a long time.

He shows what a VEX document is and the workflow on how it is used. Finally ~16:30 Solar Turbines shows how they are using VEX. And they leave about 8 minutes for Q&A at the end.
